description_long: This is a medium-sized, open-topped corrugated cardboard box with four flaps, two of which are partially folded outward. The box is marked with a blue ULINE shipping label on one side, indicating it is a shipping supply container. The cardboard shows signs of wear, with some discoloration and rough, slightly torn edges along the top flaps. The interior is visible and empty, revealing the typical brown, fibrous texture of corrugated cardboard. The box is rectangular in shape and appears lightweight, designed for carrying or storing items. Its utilitarian appearance and branding suggest it is commonly used for shipping or moving goods in urban environments.
description: A worn, open corrugated cardboard box with ULINE branding and visible flaps, showing signs of use and discoloration.
description_view_0: The box is seen from above, showing the open top with all four flaps visible and the ULINE label on the front side.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the ULINE label and the rough, torn edge of the top flap, with both side flaps partially open.
description_view_2: The box is viewed from the opposite side, again showing the ULINE label and the open flaps, with the interior visible.
description_view_3: The rear view shows the plain cardboard back with no visible branding and the flaps open, revealing the box's empty interior.
